app.title: Article30
account.title: Account
account.profile.title: Profile
account.profile.description: Your name appears in audit trails, PDF exports, and shared lists.
settings.language.title: Language
settings.language.description: Choose the language used across the interface.
auth.dsr.title: Want to submit a request?
auth.dsr.description: You don't need an account to exercise your data-protection rights. Submit a request and we'll respond within the legal deadline.
auth.forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
auth.forgotPassword.body: Enter the email associated with your account and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.forgotPassword.successCard: If an account with that email exists, a reset link has been sent. Check your inbox.
auth.forgotPassword.disabled.title: Password reset by email is disabled
auth.forgotPassword.disabled.body: Password reset is not available on this instance. Please contact your administrator.
auth.resetPassword.title: Set a new password
auth.resetPassword.invalidTokenCard: This reset link is missing or invalid. Request a new one from the forgot-password page.
auth.resetPassword.mismatchError: New password and confirmation do not match.
auth.resetPassword.genericError: This reset link is invalid or expired. Request a new one.
auth.resetPassword.successToast: Password updated. You can log in with your new password.
auth.changePassword.title: Change password
auth.changePassword.mismatchError: New password and confirmation do not match.
auth.changePassword.successToast: Password updated. Other sessions have been signed out.
auth.password.hint: Minimum {{min}} characters, mixing at least 2 of: lowercase, uppercase, digit, symbol.
auth.signup.closed.title: Signup is closed
auth.signup.closed.body: This instance is invite-only. Contact your administrator for an invitation link.
common.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this item?
register.markAsReviewed.title: Mark as reviewed?
register.markAsReviewed.description: This stamps the treatment with today's review date and updates its freshness indicator.
register.delete.title: Delete this treatment?
register.delete.description: This permanently removes the treatment from the register. The action is logged in the audit trail and cannot be undone.
dashboard.auditPack.label: Audit pack
dashboard.auditPack.tooltip: Download a ZIP bundle containing the compliance summary, the full treatment register (CSV), the governance checklist, and the violations report — meant for audits or regulator inquiries.
dashboard.exportReport.label: Export register
dashboard.exportReport.tooltip: Download a PDF compliance summary — a snapshot of the register, governance, and violation indicators at the current point in time.
register.title: Treatment register
register.import.title: Import treatments from XLSX
register.import.error.name_conflict_exis: A treatment with this name already exists.
register.import.error.unknown: An unrecognised error occurred. Please contact support.
register.import.error.xlsx_unreadable: Could not read the file as XLSX.
register.import.error.treatments_sheet_m: The Treatments worksheet is missing from the file.
register.import.error.missing_columns: The file is missing required columns.
treatment.name: Treatment name
treatment.cannotValidateOwn: Separation of duties: validation must be performed by someone other than the treatment's creator, even for admins.
recipientType.THIRD_COUNTRIES: Recipients in third countries or international organizations
riskCriteria.EVALUATION_SCORING.descript: The processing evaluates personal aspects of natural persons, in particular to analyze or predict their work performance, economic situation, health, preferences, interests, reliability, behavior, location, or movements.
riskCriteria.AUTOMATED_DECISIONS.descrip: The processing involves automated decision-making that produces legal effects or significantly affects the data subjects.
riskCriteria.SYSTEMATIC_MONITORING.descr: The processing involves systematic observation, monitoring, or control of data subjects, including data collection via networks.
riskCriteria.SENSITIVE_DATA.description: The processing concerns sensitive data within the meaning of Article 9 of the GDPR or highly personal data (location, financial data, etc.).
riskCriteria.LARGE_SCALE.description: The processing concerns a large number of data subjects or a significant volume of personal data.
riskCriteria.CROSS_DATASET.description: The processing combines or compares data from multiple sources in a way that may exceed the expectations of data subjects.
riskCriteria.VULNERABLE_PERSONS.descript: The processing concerns vulnerable persons (children, elderly, patients, asylum seekers, employees in a power imbalance).
riskCriteria.INNOVATIVE_TECH.description: The processing uses new technologies or innovative application of existing technologies (AI, facial recognition, IoT, etc.).
riskCriteria.EXCLUSION_RIGHTS.descriptio: The processing may prevent data subjects from exercising a right or benefiting from a service or contract.
aipd.warning: Warning: This treatment has at least 2 CNIL risk criteria and requires a Data Protection Impact Assessment (DPIA) in accordance with Article 35 of the GDPR.
violations.title: Data violations
violation.title: Title
dashboard.title: Dashboard
checklist.title: Governance posture
checklist.subtitle: Organization-wide self-assessment of governance posture.
checklist.heroDescription: Run a guided checklist on a single processing activity to obtain a compliance verdict and convert it into a register entry.
checklist.governanceDescription: Global governance posture, independent of any treatment. Covers processor management, DPO governance, international transfers, the records of processing, and the breach procedure.
checklist.useScreening: Use the treatment checklist to assess a treatment
checklist.disclaimer: This checklist covers key GDPR principles but is not exhaustive. Consult your DPO for a complete compliance assessment.
recitals.title: GDPR Recitals
articles.title: GDPR Articles
auditLog.title: Audit Log
users.title: User Management
users.name: Name
users.resetPassword.confirm.title: Reset this user's password?
users.resetPassword.confirm.body: You'll receive a one-time reset URL for {email}. Share it with them out-of-band (chat, in person). The URL expires in 60 minutes.
users.resetPassword.success.title: Reset URL issued
users.resetPassword.success.body: Copy this URL and share it with the user now. It will not be shown again.
users.invite.form.title: Invite a new user
users.invite.form.body: They'll receive a one-time link to set their own password.
users.invite.url.title: Invite link issued
users.invite.url.body: Copy this link and share it with the invitee now. It will not be shown again.
roleMatrix.dialog.title: Role permissions
roleMatrix.dialog.description: What each role can do in this system.
roleMatrix.capability.dashboard.view: View dashboard, register, checklist, recitals, violations
roleMatrix.capability.treatment.validate: Validate, invalidate, mark reviewed, export PDF (treatments)
roleMatrix.capability.auditLog.view: View audit log, compliance reports, screenings, regulatory updates
roleMatrix.capability.dsr.access: Read or write data subject requests
roleMatrix.capability.users.manage: Manage users (approve, change role, deactivate, invite, admin-reset)
roleMatrix.capability.organization.edit: Edit organization settings, RSS feeds, sync regulatory updates
roleMatrix.capability.vendor.write: Create or edit vendors and assessments
roleMatrix.footnote.processOwner: PROCESS_OWNER — scoped to treatment create/update only.
roleMatrix.footnote.auditor: AUDITOR — read + export only. Never writes.
settings.title: Organization Settings
settings.freshnessConfigDescription: These settings define when treatments are considered as needing review.
settings.governance.title: Governance
settings.governance.description: Audit controls applied to the treatment validation cycle.
settings.governance.separationHint: On: the same person cannot create then validate a treatment. Recommended as soon as at least two ADMIN or DPO users are active in the organization.
settings.governance.separationOffWarning: ⚠ Separation of duties is disabled. Any admin or DPO can now validate their own treatments. Only leave it off when a single person carries the GDPR responsibility.
badge.completeness.title: Completeness
badge.risk.title: Risk
badge.freshness.title: Freshness
dsr.title: Data Subject Requests
dsr.publicEndpointDescription: Share this link with data subjects so they can submit their requests directly. You can embed it in your privacy page or contact form.
dsr.responseNotesHint: Describe the response provided to the data subject (information delivered, data rectified, data erased…). Optional.
dsr.closureReasonHint: Specify why the request is being closed (response accepted, request withdrawn, out of scope…). Optional.
dsr.accessDenied.title: Access denied
dsr.accessDenied.body: You don't have permission to view data subject requests. Contact your administrator if you need access.
dsr.submit.title: Exercise your data rights
dsr.submit.confirmation: Your request has been received. Reference: {{id}}. You will receive a response within 30 days.
alerts.title: Items Needing Attention
checklist.actionPlanPlaceholder: Describe what needs to be done...
executive.title: Executive Dashboard
executive.noSnapshots: Compliance history will appear after the first monthly snapshot
documents.title: Documents
vendor.title: Processor/Vendor Registry
vendor.name: Name
vendor.dpa.title: Data Processing Agreement
vendor.dpa.body: Contract required by GDPR Art. 28 between the controller (you) and every processor handling personal data. It sets out security obligations, the list of approved sub-processors, the processing duration, and end-of-contract terms.
assessment.title: Risk Assessment
iso.title: ISO 27001/27701 Compliance Mapping
regulatory.title: Regulatory Watch
regulatory.empty: No regulatory updates yet. Click Sync to fetch latest.
settings.rssFeedsDescription: Configure RSS feeds for automatic regulatory watch.
settings.feedDeleteConfirm: Delete this feed and all its entries?
settings.notifications.title: Email notifications
settings.notifications.description: You'll receive email alerts for these events (on top of the always-on alerts for new DSRs, violations, and tasks).
settings.notifications.dsrDeadline.label: DSR deadline
settings.notifications.dsrDeadline.help: Reminder at D-7, D-1, and the day after the deadline.
settings.notifications.vendorDpaExpiry.h: Reminder at D-30, D-7, and D-1.
settings.notifications.treatmentReview.h: Reminder at D-7 and the day after.
settings.notifications.violation72h.help: Reminder every 6h within the 72h window for HIGH/CRITICAL violations.
screening.title: Treatment checklist
screening.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Newsletter marketing, Employee GPS tracking...
screening.empty: No treatment checklists yet. Run your first assessment.

dsr.pauses.title: Pauses
dsr.pauses.openPauseHint: An open pause exists. Use the workflow tab to resume (transition to ACKNOWLEDGED).

page.account.title: My account
page.account.description: Update your personal profile, password, and display preferences.
page.alerts.title: Alerts
page.alerts.description: Keep an eye on deadlines and anomalies before they slip.
page.articles.title: GDPR articles
page.articles.description: Browse the GDPR articles in five languages, with keyword search.
page.auditLog.title: Audit log
page.auditLog.description: Guarantee tamper-evident traceability of every sensitive action on the platform.
page.checklist.title: Assess a treatment
page.checklist.description: Assess a processing activity through a guided checklist and obtain a compliance verdict.
page.dashboard.title: Dashboard
page.dashboard.description: See your GDPR posture at a glance — compliance score, critical alerts, and register health.
page.dsr.title: Data-subject requests
page.dsr.description: Receive and process data-subject requests within the statutory deadlines.
page.governance.title: Governance
page.governance.description: Self-assess your governance posture against the cross-cutting requirements of the GDPR.
page.iso.title: ISO mapping
page.iso.description: Cross-reference GDPR articles with ISO 27001 / 27701 controls to drive your audits.
page.recitals.title: Recitals
page.recitals.description: Browse the 173 GDPR recitals in five languages, with keyword search.
page.register.title: Treatment register
page.register.description: List your processing activities, track their freshness, and export your GDPR register.
page.regulatoryUpdates.title: Regulatory watch
page.regulatoryUpdates.description: Follow publications from the CNIL, EDPB and other regulators via your RSS feeds.
page.settings.title: Settings
page.settings.description: Configure the organization profile, governance settings, and integrations. Admin-only.
page.users.title: Users
page.users.description: Invite and manage user accounts, their roles, and approval status. Admin-only.
page.vendors.title: Processors
page.vendors.description: List your processors, track their DPAs, and assess their risk.
page.violations.title: Violations
page.violations.description: Report incidents, classify their severity, and drive the regulator notification.
page.glossary.title: Glossary
page.glossary.description: Reference of GDPR / RGPD acronyms, concepts, roles and adjacent compliance frameworks.
